data.body:
They did that a lot back then.

We were in a very bad period of the economy and imports, so when stuff got old and replaced elsewhere, they just facelifted it there and sold it "like the new one but local".

Stuff we didn't get: Golf V, Peugeot 207, second gen 308

Stuff we got: Corsa B until 2016 😂
